channel.title: Research on Scepter914 Website
channel.description: Recent content in Research on Scepter914 Website

item.title: Adaptive Visual Shock Absorber with Magslider
item.description: Summary concept control strategy In this study, a visual shock absorber capable of adapting to free-fall objects with various weights and speeds is designed and realized. An experiment was conducted for the receiving of balls in free-fall and the adaptive shock absorber succeeded in adaptively receiving the light wood ball with different velocities. To realize an adaptive visual shock absorber, the framework using three elements were developed.

item.title: 磁石歯車を用いた直動機構''Magslider''による高速衝撃吸収制御
item.description: Summary concept control strategy 本研究ではしなやかな制御を目指して、磁石歯車を用いた直動機構”Magslider”による高速衝撃吸収制御を開

item.title: 高速ビジョンシステムを用いた無人航空機ヘの荷物受け渡しシステムの開発
item.description: Summary http://ishikawa-vision.org/fusion/UAVdelivery/index-j.htmlにおける成果 無人航空機

item.title: High speed supply station for UAV delivery system
item.description: Summary Researched at http://ishikawa-vision.org/fusion/UAVdelivery/index-e.html Although research on physical distribution using unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) has seen increasingly significant interest, the task of automatically loading a parcel onto a UAV has not been researched adequately. In this study, to design an automatic UAV delivery system, we achieved the task of non-stop handover of a parcel to an airborne UAV. For the handover task, we developed a novel tracking system with high-speed, multi-camera vision using cameras with different frame rates.

item.title: Publication
item.description: Research Field Robotics, Computer Vision System integration of high-speed robot using 1000fps high-speed image processing Deformation Control, robot force control for dynamic manipulation Application of high-speed visual control for logistics, Unmanned Aerial Vehicle(UAV) International Conference (First Author) Satoshi Tanaka, Keisuke Koyama, Taku Senoo, and Masatoshi Ishikawa: Adaptive Visual Shock Absorber with Visual-based Maxwell Model Using Magnetic Gear, The 2020 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA2020) (Paris, 2020.

item.title: 研究成果
item.description: 研究分野 人間より器用かつ速くタスクを達成する，物理世界とインタラクションする自動ロボットシステムの構築 ロボット工学, コンピュータビジョン 10
